name: Chocolate Puffs
intro: Quinoa is rich in protein, and quinoa puffs are scrumptious when mixed into balls and chocolate. The puffs are not categorized as raw food, but they’re still a superfood! Use paper or silicone muffin cups, or try silicone ice cream molds.
method: Melt the cacao butter and coconut oil over a lukewarm water bath. Stir in the quinoa puffs, cacao powder, syrup, and lucuma powder. With a spoon, fill the muffin cups halfway. Store in the freezer. These taste best eaten while still chilled, since the cocoa butter and coconut oil will melt after a while.
